title: ZGTS 3 Bunches Peony Artificial Flowers Silk Peonies Bouquets Pink Flowers for table Centerpieces Floral Arrangement Faux Flower for Home Kitchen Garden Party Wedding Decoration (Pink)
features: 3 BUNCHES ARTIFICIAL FLOWERS:Package includes 3 bunches artificial pink peony flowers.The flower bouquet measures 32cm(12.6 inch) in height.Each bundle has 5 branches,5 big peony flowers in 6cm diameter,4 small buds in 3cm diameter and some berries,spikes,leaves.The 3 bunches of flowers put together will make a full and beautiful bouquet.

HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL:The flowers,buds and leaves are made of high quality silk fabric,the flower head is full,petals and leaves are vivid and natural;the berries,flower spikes and stems are made of sturdy plastic.The flower stems are built-in steel wire,you can bend it into any shape to arrange the peonies as you want.

LONG-LASTING FAKE FLOWERS:These artificial flowers are easy to maintain.They can stay fresh for long time and never wilt,no need for watering,sunlight or pruning.They are easy to clean,you can use a wet cloth to wipe out the dust or stain on it.They are a great alternative for those who have mo time to take care of flowers.

VIVID DECORATION FLOWERS:With the full blooming peony flowers,buds waiting to bloom,green leaves and flower spikes,these decoration flowers look fresh,vibrant and vivid,perfect decorations for home,office and garden.They will bring the beauty of nature into your life,and bring you a pleasant visual feel and nice mood.

PERFECT HOME DECORATIONS:These artificial flowers are suitable for home decoration,garden decoration,party decoration or wedding decoration.You can put them in a vase and place them at your living room,bedroom,bathroom, kitchen or office,which will make your living environment full of vitality and create a natural and fresh atmosphere.
description: Product Description Easy maintenance,stays fresh and never wilt bendable stems,can be freely arranged Easy to assemble and easy to clean Vivid decoration flowers,perfect for home,garden,wedding or party decoration,bring you a pleasant feel and nice mood Specifications: Material:silk fabric;plastic Height:32cm/12.6inch Flower Diameter:6cm/2.36inch Bud Diameter:3cm/1.18inch Color:pink Bouquet Weight:50g/bunch Package Weight:160g Package Includes: 3 bunches pink artificial flowers NOTE: 1.Vase is NOT included in the package 2.Due to hand measurement, there may be some errors in size 3. Due to the light,the flower color may be slightly different from the pictures 4.It may smell a little after opening. Please put it outside for a day or two 5.Each bouquet are putting close when shipped,you can adjust it to the most natural state 6.If there are flower falls by accident in the package, please directly re-insert into the branches Home decoration Photographic prop Wedding bouquet
